alerts.source: United Arab Emirates Ministry of Defence
alerts.title: UAE Air Defenses Intercepting Iranian Missiles and Drones
alerts.description: UAE air defenses are currently responding to incoming missile and drone threats from Iran. Air defense systems are intercepting ballistic missiles, and fighter jets are intercepting drones. Sounds heard across the country are from interception activities.

alerts.source: United Arab Emirates Ministry of Defence
alerts.title: UAE Air Defenses Responding to Iranian Missile and Drone Attack
alerts.description: UAE air defense systems are currently intercepting incoming ballistic missiles and drones from Iran. Sounds heard across various areas are result of air defense interceptions.

alerts.source: United Arab Emirates Ministry of Defence
alerts.title: UAE Air Defences Engaged Iranian Attacks
alerts.description: UAE air defenses engaged Iranian ballistic missiles, cruise missiles and UAVs. Daily totals: 4 ballistic missiles, 25 UAVs. Cumulative statistics show 345 ballistic missiles, 15 cruise missiles, and 1773 UAVs since Iranian aggression began.

alerts.source: United Arab Emirates Ministry of Defence
alerts.title: UAE intercepts 4 ballistic missiles and 25 UAVs from Iran
alerts.description: UAE air defense systems successfully engaged 4 ballistic missiles and 25 UAVs launched from Iran on March 22, 2026. Total cumulative engagements now stand at 345 ballistic missiles, 15 cruise missiles and 1773 UAVs since Iranian aggression began.

alerts.source: United Arab Emirates Ministry of Defence
alerts.title: UAE Air Defenses Intercept Iranian Missiles and Drones
alerts.description: UAE air defenses successfully intercepted 4 ballistic missiles and 25 drones from Iran. Since Iranian attacks began, UAE has dealt with 345 ballistic missiles, 15 cruise missiles, and 1773 drones total. Attacks resulted in 2 military casualties, 6 civilian deaths, and 160 injuries.
